name: e22-plugins
description: Element 22 organization standards for Claude Code. Ships e22-standards (E22's always-on operating rules + spec-workflow skills and templates) and re-lists Anthropic's frontend-design plugin (pinned, not forked) so product repos get distinctive UI craft from the same marketplace — org standards live in one place and update centrally instead of being frozen into every forked repo.

plugins.name: e22-standards
plugins.description: Element 22's always-on engineering operating manual — stack defaults, monorepo layout, spec workflow, testing rules, Definition of Done, high-risk areas, secrets handling, change-size model, and the baseline patterns/anti-patterns. Injected every session via a SessionStart hook, with on-demand skills for first-run setup, spec scaffolding, and ADRs.

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.description: Anthropic's official frontend-design skill, re-listed (not forked) so E22 product repos install distinctive, non-generic UI craft from one marketplace. Pinned by SHA — bump it to update. Scoped to E22's stack and DESIGN.md uniformity discipline by e22-standards' /e22-design-sources; defer to a committed design export when one exists.
